title: Evangelion Finally Ver Long John Silver

wikitext: []: Evangelion Finally (Ver. Long John Silver)             Quote Post by Dartz » Sat May 14, 2022 6:34 pm There is only one true way to listen to anime soundtracks (Even if you've already bought the record) There's not a bad sound off the tape at all --- even from a deck from the late 70's. It's certainly a bit more convenient than spinning up the record once I've got it recorded over. One tape flip, versus a disc change and 2 side changes.....

Article: Evangelion Finally Ver Long John Silver
[]: Evangelion Finally (Ver. Long John Silver)             Quote Post by Dartz » Sat May 14, 2022 6:34 pm There is only one true way to listen to anime soundtracks (Even if you've already bought the record) There's not a bad sound off the tape at all --- even from a deck from the late 70's. It's certainly a bit more convenient than spinning up the record once I've got it recorded over. One tape flip, versus a disc change and 2 side changes.....
